---
title: "Page 4 - Methods Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06-sp04"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: True
---









## Method

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a clear explanation of what the method, process, or analytical approach is._]

---

## When to use this

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe the specific situations or conditions where this method is appropriate._]

---

## Steps

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a step-by-step breakdown of how to apply the method correctly._]

---

## Example

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short illustrative example of the method in use._]

---

## Limitations and considerations

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Detail any key limitations, assumptions, or risks associated with this approach._]

---





---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide an overview of the sequence or process the learner is about to follow._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.step-sequence}
<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the numbered steps or procedural stages here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set up the decision-making scenario or situation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.decision-checkpoint}
**Decision Moment**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe the situation and the immediate challenge or choice being faced._]

**What would you do next?**
1. Option A
2. Option B
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Rationale and Considerations**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for each option._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Briefly explain the consequences or provide a transition to the next topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this formula_focus explanation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.math-explanation data-variant="formula_focus"}
**Conceptual Logic**

$$ e = mc^2 $$

**Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a conceptual explanation._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Assessment Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 5 - Case Study Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
